name: Hestia Insight Inc.
summary: General Unless the context otherwise requires, in this report, the terms Hestia Insight, Company, HSTA, we, or our refers to Hestia Insight Inc., a Nevada corporation. The Companys principal office is located at 732 S. 6th Street #4762 Las Vegas, NV 89101. The Companys telephone number is (516) 212-0727.
